title: spec build DAG resource (spec://current/dag)
description: Wire schema of the spec://current/dag MCP resource. This is the versioned interface a build adapter integrates against. Changes within build-port/v1 are additive only.

schemaVersion.description: Schema identifier. Adapters MUST check the major version (build-port/v1).

maxParallel.description: Fan-out bound across ready nodes within a wave. 0 means use the harness default.

nodes.description: Every DAG node in plan order.

repo.description: Target repo; empty for a repo-less fallback node.

layer.description: Optional layer tag used for skill routing.

dependsOn.description: Node ids this node depends on. Empty for a root.

skillPaths.description: Capability skill paths routed to this node's worker by the active SkillRouter. Delivered to workers via spec_provision_node; never loaded by the conductor itself. Empty under the 'none' router.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Resolved §6 acceptance-criteria text this node must satisfy, from its (ac: N) annotation. Omitted when the node maps to no criteria.

qualityGates.description: Verification commands the node must pass, composed from the registry. Omitted when none apply.

waves.description: Topologically ordered waves; each wave is an array of node ids whose dependencies are satisfied by earlier waves. Resolve ids against nodes[].

error.description: Present only when the PR stack did not form a valid DAG. When set, nodes/waves are empty and the build is not launchable.
